projects.title: CLAM-based Image-Caption Generation
projects.intro: The high cost of labeling in the medical field has led to a lack of annotated data related to whole slide imaging (WSI), thereby limiting the performance of many downstream tasks, such as training and application of pathology CLIP.
projects.description:
Project Background: The high cost of annotation in the medical field has led to a lack of annotated data related to whole slide imaging (WSI), thereby limiting the performance of many downstream tasks, such as training and application of pathology CLIP.
 Project Objective: Utilize the existing capabilities of CLAM to perform weakly supervised - few-shot annotations on WSI images. For all WSI tasks, given <10 WSI data with only WSI-level labels, provide patch-level labels for all such WSI task images. 
 Research Progress: The process of generating patch-level labels from WSI-level labels has been completed, with an overall progress of 70%.

paper.paperTitle: PaM-MIL: Proliferation and Metastasis Enhanced Localization for Multiple Instance Learning on Pathology Images

patent.name: A Positive Instance Localziation Framework for Multiple Instance Learning on Whole Slide Images
applicants: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou)
